name: Cross-Receiver Open-Set Radio Frequency Fingerprinting via Structure-First Adaptation

description: arXiv:2607.02567v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Radio frequency fingerprint identification (RFFI) provides a critical physical-layer security mechanism for dynamic Internet of Things (IoT) and ad hoc networks. However, the decentralized and open nature of these networks imposes two strict deployment criteria: the credential must transfer reliably across physically dispersed, heterogen...
author: Fengchong Yao, Jianbing Li, Qing Liu, Kefeng Song, Haitao Li, Song Wang, Feixiang Wang
